action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 12 LightGBM (huber, tuned) gave val_IC 0.0548, test_IC 0.0339, rank_IC 0.0089. Analysis: rank_IC is very low, indicating model is not learning cross-sectional ordering. The regression objective on absolute returns is sensitive to day-specific means/vars, diluting ranking signal. Decision: standardize training labels per day (cross-sectional z-score) to force model to learn relative rankings within each day. This is a common Qlib trick. Keep validation metric on original labels. Use same hyperparams (LightGBM huber), but add label normalization. Expect improvement in IC and especially rank_IC.
